key.name: poll-interval-seconds
key.summary: How often to poll the usage endpoint, in seconds

key.name: alert-threshold
key.summary: Percentage at which the indicator turns red and a notification fires

key.name: high-threshold
key.summary: Percentage at which the indicator turns orange

key.name: notify-threshold
key.summary: Notify when a limit crosses the alert threshold

key.name: notify-reset
key.summary: Notify when a limit window resets

key.name: show-percent-label
key.summary: Show the worst bucket's percentage next to the panel icon
